description:
Why do so many people still reach for punishment when things get difficult?

What do you think about this new study “Dog Owners’ Use of Training Methods and Their Ethical Stance on the Treatment of Animals”? 

https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/08927936.2025.2597086

Sign up for my free 30 day training guide HERE: https://pupford.com/training
title: Why Do So Many Dog Guardians Still Do This?
